creator: yarodin@gmail.com
text:
Update www/p5-FCGI-ProcManager to 0.18

How to apply patch:
1) Put patch-p5-FCGI-ProcManager.txt to /usr/ports/www/
2) cd /usr/ports/www/ && patch -p <patch-p5-FCGI-ProcManager.txt && find /usr/ports/www/p5-FCGI-ProcManager/ -type f -name "*.orig" -exec rm -f {} \;

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
